overall.description: A slow cinematic drone shot through Night City from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera glides above a fog-shrouded street surrounded by towering megabuildings with illuminated windows, passing a large digital billboard before continuing deeper into the misty urban canyon. The atmosphere is thick with atmospheric haze and illuminated by green-yellow neon lights and building windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown street with digital advertising

events.description: establishing aerial view of cyberpunk city canyon with digital billboard prominent on right
digital billboard cycles advertisement content from ALL FOODS to EEZYBEEF

agents.ego_description: slowly flying forward through the city canyon at aerial height, observing the towering architecture and illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying animated advertisements with ALL FOODS and EEZYBEEF branding
tall dark glass towers with grid-patterned illuminated windows rising into the fog
tall glass skyscrapers with scattered lit windows against the night sky
cylindrical building with horizontal colored neon rings visible down the street
elevated roadway structure with purple neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic city street flanked by massive glass skyscrapers. A large digital billboard dominates the right foreground, cycling through advertisements while the camera slowly advances. The street below is wet and reflective, with an elevated highway visible on the left, all bathed in the greenish haze of neon lights and building illumination.

events.description: digital billboard exits frame right as camera passes the structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the city canyon, descending slightly as it moves deeper between the towering skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the camera continues its slow forward movement deeper into the urban canyon. The cylindrical neon-ringed building grows larger in the frame as the camera approaches, while the megabuilding clusters persist on both sides. The atmosphere remains thick with fog, and the street below stretches into the hazy distance with no visible traffic or pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a neon-lit urban canyon that deepens as the camera moves further into a fog-shrouded futuristic city. It begins by passing a large, cycling digital billboard on the right, overlooking a wet, reflective street and an elevated highway flanked by massive glass skyscrapers. As the camera advances past the advertisement, the greenish haze of the neon lights becomes more immersive, drawing the viewer deeper into the oppressive scale of the surrounding megabuilding clusters. The scene then shifts focus toward a cylindrical, neon-ringed building that grows larger in the frame as the camera pushes forward. Finally, the perspective stretches into the hazy distance of the empty street, where the architecture blends into a thick, atmospheric fog.
